title: Personalised Christmas Stockings Custom Family Stockings Christmas Decorations Large Xmas Stockings Hanging Gift Bag Socks Ornaments Candy Pouch Bag for Kids Adults (Snowman-3D)
features: Personalised Christmas Stockings: Stockings with names really help Santa to organise his gifts, our red and white Christmas stockings give you a traditional Christmas vibe, Make Christmas even more special.Please click on Customize now to enter your personalised names.

Santa Snowman Penguin Design: 3 different designs, with your personalised name, gift bag for family boy girl children. AND There's enough room to fill it with all the sweets, gifts, and treats you want.

Large Size Christmas Stockings: approx 20cm*45cm. Your customized message will be customized with white metal lettering film instead of knitting.(Note: Please note to check the personalised spelling.)

Easy to Hang: Personalised Christmas stockings are designed with sturdy hanging loops to ensure you can hang them securely and easily. The perfect Christmas decoration for fireplace decorations and Christmas trees.

Widely Use: Our personalized Christmas stockings are suitable for hanging on fireplaces, Christmas trees, walls, front doors, railings as fireplace decorations and gift bags. Makes the perfect gift for family and friends. Add to the Christmas spirit.
description: 3 different designs (Santa, Snowman, Penguin) with your personalised name, gift bag for family boy girl children. All boots get a general size, and you can hang nicely in one line, or mix and match. Stockings with names really help Santa to organise his gifts, the bigger size will carry more gifts. Size: approx 20cm*45cm. Your customized message will be customized with white metal lettering film instead of knitting.
